summary.coverage_note: New files (useTerminalSessionStore, TerminalTab, TerminalPanel refactor) have >90% coverage. 1 test case (TC-060) classified as failed due to BUG-005 (Low, open). 1 test case skipped (TC-055, perf, browser-harness required). Vitest suite passes 868/868.

performance.tab_switch_latency_note: Tab switch is a CSS class toggle (isActive ? 'flex-1...' : 'hidden'). No xterm.js reinit occurs. DOM update is synchronous on Zustand state change — estimated < 5ms. Formal P95 measurement requires a browser-based harness (Playwright + Performance API). N-02 target of < 50ms is expected to be met.

owasp_checks.notes: Terminal panel is a local dev tool with no authentication layer. All PTY sessions run as the local user — no privilege escalation surface.
WebSocket connections are ws:// (not wss://) — acceptable for localhost-only dev tool. No credentials or sensitive data transmitted in session metadata.

Agent commands are passed directly to the PTY via sendInput(cmd + '\r'). The PTY executes as the local user — this is the intended behaviour. No server-side sanitization is applied or needed. User is advised that agent prompt injection (malicious agent output containing shell commands) could affect the PTY session. Advisory only — local dev tool context.
Session IDs are generated via crypto.randomUUID() — cryptographically random. The server does not use sessionId for routing or authorization; it is a client-side token only.
MAX_CONNECTIONS=5 on server acts as hard cap. MAX_SESSIONS=4 in frontend prevents cap exhaustion. No new server configuration was introduced.
No new npm packages introduced. xterm.js and Zustand versions unchanged.
No authentication layer. Local dev tool — out of threat model.

owasp_checks.category: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No deserialization of external data. WebSocket messages are plain text (PTY output). No integrity checks required.

owasp_checks.category: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
owasp_checks.notes: No per-session audit logging added. Existing terminal.js logs spawn/exit with remoteAddr. Session lifecycle events (add/remove/switch) are logged via console.debug in dev only. Acceptable for a local dev tool.
WebSocket URL is constructed client-side as 'ws://localhost:3000/ws/terminal?sessionId=<uuid>'. The sessionId is a UUID and the base URL is hardcoded. No SSRF surface.
Tab labels are rendered via JSX text interpolation ({session.label}) inside a <span>. React escapes all string content by default. No dangerouslySetInnerHTML used. XSS surface is not present.

test_cases.description: addSession sets new session as activeId
removeSession last tab → sessions=[], activeId=null, panelOpen=false
removeSession active tab → switches to previous
removeSession active tab first position → switches to next
removeSession → panel stays open when tabs remain
renameSession empty string → keeps previous label
test_cases.notes: BUG-002 RESOLVED: guard `if (trimmed.length === 0) return;` added at line 171. Verified in re-verification run.
BUG-002 RESOLVED: same guard handles whitespace-only input. Verified in re-verification run.

test_cases.description: updateStatus updates single session without affecting others
activeSendInput returns null when no sessions
activeSendInput returns correct fn for activeId
togglePanel writes 1 to localStorage on open
togglePanel removes key from localStorage on close
TerminalPanel hides via hidden class when panelOpen=false (BUG-001: no unmount)
test_cases.notes: BUG-001 RESOLVED: aside element has hidden class, TerminalTab components remain mounted. Test description updated to reflect fix. Verified in re-verification run.

test_cases.description: tab bar renders one chip per session
add tab button is aria-disabled at cap
reconnect bar shown when active session disconnected
reconnect bar hidden when active session connected
TerminalTab has flex/overflow classes when isActive=true
TerminalTab calls useTerminal with correct wsUrl
executeAgentRun uses activeSendInput from session store
TerminalToggle calls togglePanel from session store
TerminalToggle reads panelOpen from session store

test_cases.notes: CSS class toggle — no xterm.js reinit. Synchronous Zustand update. Expected to meet < 50ms. Formal measurement deferred to browser-based harness.

test_cases.description: Tab label XSS — renameSession with script tag
test_cases.notes: JSX text interpolation escapes all content. React does not execute strings as HTML. No XSS surface.
Advisory only. PTY runs as local user — intended behaviour. No server-side sanitization needed.

test_cases.description: F-10: panel close preserves PTY sessions (no unmount)
test_cases.notes: BUG-001 RESOLVED: TerminalPanel now uses hidden class instead of return null. TerminalTab components stay mounted. Verified in TerminalPanel.test.tsx line 73 and TerminalPanel.tsx line 98.

test_cases.description: Disabled + button tooltip matches spec wording
test_cases.notes: BUG-004 RESOLVED: title='Maximum 4 tabs open. Close a tab to open a new one.' confirmed at TerminalPanel.tsx line 201.

test_cases.description: Tab chips have aria-controls relationship to panels
test_cases.notes: BUG-005 (Low, OPEN): role=tab elements have no aria-controls attribute. tabpanel role not applied to TerminalTab containers. ARIA tabs pattern incomplete. Non-blocking for merge (Low severity).
